name: Moonweave Gloves
content:
The holiest gloves left behind by Ikrir the Radiant Moon during her Apotheosis after the fight with the Starbeast.

Tier 0. This item grants truesight equal to 5 times your proficiency bonus while attuned.
Tier 1. After reconnecting it to a place of worship of the goddess, the gloves gain a faint silver glow. You can use Silver Arrow once per long rest.
Silver Arrow. Ranged Spell Attack within 60 ft. On hit: 3d10 fire damage (cannot be reduced) and DC 17 Constitution save or the target is Sluggish (can only take one of: action, bonus action, or movement) until your next turn.
Tier 2. After slaying a being of great darkness, the gloves merge with your hands. Silver Arrow can be used 3 times per long rest, truesight increases to 10× proficiency bonus, and you gain Silver Veil.
Silver Veil. The gloves have 5 charges (regain on long rest). When you heal or grant temp HP, expend charges to add that many d6 to the effect.
